creator: piotr.rybicki@innervision.pl
text:
W dniu 2014-02-09 22:05, Ruslan Makhmatkhanov pisze:
> Piotr, please resend your patch as followup to that pr - your original 
> patch was mangled by gnats.
>
diff -ruN pear-Numbers_Words-OLD/Makefile pear-Numbers_Words/Makefile
--- pear-Numbers_Words-OLD/Makefile     2013-11-26 21:13:50.000000000 +0100
+++ pear-Numbers_Words/Makefile 2014-02-09 21:03:41.000000000 +0100
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
  # $FreeBSD: head/textproc/pear-Numbers_Words/Makefile 334871 
2013-11-25 17:59:58Z antoine $

  PORTNAME=      Numbers_Words
-PORTVERSION=   0.16.2
+PORTVERSION=   0.16.4
  CATEGORIES=    textproc pear

  MAINTAINER=    meritus@innervision.pl
diff -ruN pear-Numbers_Words-OLD/distinfo pear-Numbers_Words/distinfo
--- pear-Numbers_Words-OLD/distinfo     2014-01-23 21:07:54.000000000 +0100
+++ pear-Numbers_Words/distinfo 2014-02-09 21:05:34.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (PEAR/Numbers_Words-0.16.2.tgz) = 
8ccfc97c911b90826e52ad6db80cc425384e23fc10cc7a6742f0f000e63b64a6
-SIZE (PEAR/Numbers_Words-0.16.2.tgz) = 52956
+SHA256 (PEAR/Numbers_Words-0.16.4.tgz) = 
93aa2b8d370a9d87d1ae2595b4f1b7b78c18e0f06cd94a6eda042b6bbeb14838
+SIZE (PEAR/Numbers_Words-0.16.4.tgz) = 58379
diff -ruN pear-Numbers_Words-OLD/pkg-descr pear-Numbers_Words/pkg-descr
--- pear-Numbers_Words-OLD/pkg-descr    2014-01-23 21:07:54.000000000 +0100
+++ pear-Numbers_Words/pkg-descr        2014-02-09 21:12:51.000000000 +0100
@@ -6,11 +6,28 @@
  With the Numbers_Words::toCurrency($num, $locale, 'USD') method you 
can convert
  a number (decimal and fraction part) to words with currency name.

-The following languages are supported: bg (Bulgarian), cs (Czech), de 
(German),
-dk (Danish), ee (Estonian), en_100 (Donald Knuth system, English),
-en_GB (British English), en_US (American English), es (Spanish Castellano),
-es_AR (Argentinian Spanish), fr (French), fr_BE (French Belgium), he 
(Hebrew),
-hu_HU (Hungarian), id (Indonesian), it_IT (Italian), lt (Lithuanian),
-pl (Polish), pt_BR (Brazilian Portuguese), ru (Russian), sv (Swedish).
+The following languages are supported:
+* bg (Bulgarian)
+* cs (Czech)
+* de (German)
+* dk (Danish)
+* en_100 (Donald Knuth system, English)
+* en_GB (British English)
+* en_US (American English)
+* es (Spanish Castellano)
+* es_AR (Argentinian Spanish)
+* et (Estonian)
+* fr (French)
+* fr_BE (French Belgium)
+* he (Hebrew)
+* hu_HU (Hungarian)
+* id (Indonesian)
+* it_IT (Italian)
+* lt (Lithuanian)
+* nl (Dutch)
+* pl (Polish)
+* pt_BR (Brazilian Portuguese)
+* ru (Russian)
+* sv (Swedish)

WWW: http://pear.php.net/package/Numbers_Words
